heading: Savings provision
label: 18726 Savings provision
text: Nothing in this part affects the authority, existing on the day before , of any other Federal department or agency, including the authority provided to the Secretary of Homeland Security and the Director of the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency in title XXII of the Homeland Security Act of 2002 ( et seq.).November 15, 20216 U.S.C. 651
notes: References in TextThe Homeland Security Act of 2002, referred to in text, is , , . Title XXII of the Act is classified generally to subchapter XVIII (§651 et seq.) of chapter 1 of Title 6, Domestic Security. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 107–296116 Stat. 2135section 101 of Title 6Nov. 25, 2002

Wage Rate RequirementsFor provisions relating to rates of wages to be paid to laborers and mechanics on projects for construction, alteration, or repair work funded under div. D or an amendment by div. D of , including authority of Secretary of Labor, see .Pub. L. 117–58section 18851 of this title
